{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Ziel’s script
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]] uses a script to generate semi-transparent barriers.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
